title: Kerala University Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Research Intern Post
description: The Kerala University has declared the latest job notification for the recruitment of various Research Intern Jobs. Candidates with post-graduation can use this chance and apply for the Kerala University Notification 2026 . Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are looking for more, her...
